materialChanges: Corrected the collider glossary definition so it refers to two arrowheads meeting on a path and explains that conditioning can open the otherwise blocked path, rather than miscalling that path a directed causal path.
Updated ATTRIBUTION.md to version 0.1.1 and distinguished the first version 0.1.0 review target from the eligible version 0.1.1 original candidate and its retained draft and pending-review states.

reviewDispositions.rationale: glossary.json#term-collider now defines a collider as the point where two arrowheads meet on a path and states that conditioning or selection can open that otherwise blocked path and induce association between its causes.

ATTRIBUTION.md now reports version 0.1.1 and its candidate-boundary section explicitly distinguishes the earlier 0.1.0 candidate and review artifacts from the eligible 0.1.1 original candidate at 3a8c07f73918268817d0f49393ad0c4b15c9b013.

The final pack preserves complete outcome follow-up, the intention-to-treat assignment estimand, the observed 77 minus 74 calculation, explicit uncertainty about the underlying effect's size and direction, and the studied-course transport boundary in both the worked example and assessment key.

The transfer model and safety-critical assessment already state that a defensible external lottery can make a reported allocation contrast interpretable but cannot supply an unreported association, direction, magnitude, or nonzero field effect; the bench mechanism evidence remains separate.

The simple acyclic total-effect fork, chain, and collider structures, timing, adjustment consequences, diagram, claim ledger, and assessment answer logic already agree. The only bounded terminology defect mentioned in this note was resolved under academic finding 0.

The opening diagnostic remains before instruction, asks learners to identify assignment, design, exposure, and outcome from memory, and supplies a non-punitive PREM-SCI-004 recovery route before continuation.

The worked app example retains the task, representation, plan, ordered packet-by-packet reasoning, arithmetic, assumptions and boundaries, independent checks, contextual interpretation, and self-explanation prompt identified by the reviewer.

The adjustment misconception block still elicits a commitment, explains why reflexive adjustment fails, supplies a causal-map replacement model, and rechecks the learner on a post-assignment mediator without shaming the initial answer.

The laboratory transfer task remains a novel bounded context that requires learners to adapt association, confounding, mechanism, external-allocation, missing-result, transport, and evidence-integration judgments rather than copy the app example.
ATTRIBUTION.md now identifies the pack as version 0.1.1, matching lesson.json and all structured teaching artifacts, and clarifies which candidate and review cohort govern this finalization.

evidenceChecked: All six scene files use one level-one heading, logical level-two and level-three structure, semantic source order, ordinary text, lists, tables, and declarative prompts; no essential step depends on raw HTML, script, remote embed, hover, animation, sound, timing, or pointer-only action.

The third-variable diagram has concise alt text and a relationship-complete long description in both the diagram source and scene directive; the lesson also repeats confounder, mediator, and collider maps in prose, symbolic arrows, and plain-language phrases without relying on color or position.

Prompts are untimed and answerable through text or labelled arrows, assessment retakes are unlimited, and the accessibility section permits typing, speaking to a scribe, or drawing while preserving the same causal-judgment operation.

Every mapped material claim has complete same-scene source-note coverage, all three objectives map to assessment items, and learner-visible uncertainty, scope, recovery, and educational boundaries remain in the final source.

All six references record factual-reference use, facts-only-original-expression rights bases with concrete evidence, displayed licences, dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found access records, HTTPS routes, and no human-only source.

lesson.json declares CC-BY-4.0 and an empty thirdPartyAssets array; ATTRIBUTION.md states that the local declarative diagram and all fictional cases, numbers, prompts, feedback, and instructional structure are original and that no third-party media or dataset is redistributed.

The manifest and attribution disclose the accountable principal and all material authoring agents with run IDs and instruction digests; the eligible reviews disclose their shared-operator conflicts, and this adjudication discloses the fresh finalizer run separately.

All cases are labelled fictional where introduced, no identifiable learner or patient data are requested, and the pack contains no executable code, unsafe active media, secrets, clinical instruction, diagnosis, treatment, or personal-risk claim.
limitations: This was a source-level audit; no rendered browser, representative screen reader, 200-percent zoom/reflow, keyboard-only interface, reduced-motion mode, print output, or unavailable non-web exporter was exercised in this run.

The audit checked the complete dated source-access and reuse records against the project policy but did not reopen external source pages or independently reverify current publisher, NCBI, robots, or licence terms; it is not a legal opinion.
Repository source preflight and npm validation were not run because the operator explicitly prohibited npm and access to scripts; those automated checks remain an operator condition.

rationale: The recomputed standard-lesson snapshot counts exactly the two 0.1.1 advisory artifacts named in reviewIds: one academic approval and one learning-design approval, from two distinct declared agent runs and two distinct declared model families/providers, both reviewing candidate 3a8c07f73918268817d0f49393ad0c4b15c9b013. Both reviewers identify github:VSBDev as the accountable operator and declare that founding-stage operational conflict, so distinctPrincipals is one; this record treats agent and provider provenance as operator-attested rather than independently verified. The two retained 0.1.0 review artifacts are excluded because they target lesson version 0.1.0 and commit 6b66a745dd99bb85ffa05cabf0252302626cc694, not this candidate. The operator states that both counted artifacts have equivalent non-dismissed COMMENTED review transports on pull request 52; this run did not independently inspect GitHub state. Every one of the ten findings in the eligible inputs has an indexed disposition. The coherent final revision incorporates the collider terminology correction and the shared attribution-version correction while preserving the eight positively verified instructional and academic features. Manual checks of the resulting pack confirmed JSON syntax, lesson/version identity, 180 declared and summed minutes, 15 assessment and rubric points, complete claim-to-source-note coverage, complete objective-to-assessment links, semantic headings, diagram text equivalence, facts-only source-use records, zero human-only sources, zero third-party assets, original-material attribution, privacy and security boundaries, and no unresolved academic, learning-design, accessibility, or rights blocker. The temporary final-commit and runtime placeholders and the prohibited automated validation are explicit operator conditions rather than claims that those checks already passed. On that evidence, the lesson content warrants merge once the conditions are satisfied; this decision does not authorize a GitHub merge or publication.
conditions: After committing the final content and both cited review artifacts, the operator must replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT with that exact 40-character commit SHA and replace all four RUNTIME-STAMPED agent-identity fields from the runtime banner before treating this artifact as schema-valid or submitting it.

The operator must run the strict source preflight and repository validation required by the project after stamping, confirm the equivalent non-dismissed COMMENTED transports on pull request 52, and stop rather than merge if any protected check fails.

No teaching content may change after the stamped final commit; the maintainer may perform only the separately authorized publication transition for lesson status, source confidence, and retained claim review-status fields.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev — accountable operator for the fresh finalizer and adjudicator
